content.en:
Fusing the Black Scale Domain Dragon bloodline would be so powerful, so many peak realm gods wanted to fuse the Black Scale Domain Dragon bloodline, but without the corresponding method of transforming the flesh, they could not successfully fuse at all.

Within the Ice Ghost Organization, only these peak realm gods know this secret, and they have all fused the extra-dimensional bloodline, and there is no way to fuse the second extra-dimensional bloodline, and they have made an oath that they will naturally not divulge this secret.

Otherwise, the gods of the Ziya Realm will definitely be targeted by powerful extradimensional forces.

At this time.

The Great Leader Ice Bee Realm God saw that the Ziya Realm God said this, so he agreed.

"Okay, I will find a way to buy a drop of Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood, once Ziya you break through the half-step transcendent realm, we will attack and kill the Ye Heaven Realm God of the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two Territory, but if you don't break through, I won't attack and kill the Ye Heaven Realm God!"

The Ice Bee God said.

"Good!"

The God of the Tooth Realm nodded.

Immediately.

The Ice Bee Realm God went to find the true blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon.

The Black Scale Domain Dragon is relatively rare, but it is not non-existent, with the current half-step cultivation of the Ice Bee Realm God, he can contact many forces, and there are many trading channels, as long as there are enough Super Dimensional Treasure Coins, he can definitely buy the true blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon.

The only thing to pay attention to is his own safety, after all, 157 if he buys the true blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, he may be targeted, and other forces will think that he has the method of transforming the flesh corresponding to the bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon.

Originally.

The god of the Ziya Realm also found a black scale domain dragon bloodline and the method of transforming the flesh in a ruin, and did not trade it, if it was a transaction, maybe he would have been targeted a long time ago, and he would not have survived at all.

Time passes slowly.

The Ice Bee Realm God kept searching, and after a period of time, he finally found the true blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon.

However, in order to obtain this share of the true blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, the Ice Bee Realm God paid a great price, and was also hunted down by many half-step transcendent realms.

......

Ice Ghost Organization Headquarters.

The Ice Bee Realm God returned at the cost of serious injuries, and the Ziya Realm God and other peak realm gods immediately came over.

"Big Chief, what's wrong with you?"

The God of the Tooth Realm asked.

The Ice Bee Realm God said: "I was chased and killed by six half-step super-dimensional realms, fortunately, these six half-step super-dimensional realms are not powerful, I used my hole cards, and then I escaped, but I still obtained a drop of black scale domain dragon true blood." "

Immediately, he took out the true blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon and handed it to the Ziya Realm God.

"Sure enough, it is the true blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, and it is also the true blood of the half-step Transcendent Realm level Black Scale Domain Dragon, which fully meets my needs!"

The god of the sub-tooth realm was excited.

With this drop of Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood, he can mobilize the Black Scale Domain Dragon Bloodline to absorb this drop of Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood, carry out a superdimensional bloodline evolution, and use the superdimensional bloodline to spy on the essence of superdimensional power.

He was already very close to comprehending the power of the superdimension, and with this drop of the true blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, he almost hoped that he could comprehend the power of the superdimension.

"Thank you, Great Chief!"

The God of the Tooth Realm said gratefully.

"Ziya, take it to retreat, I look forward to you comprehending the power of the extradimensional and advancing to the half-step extradimensional realm, so that our ice ghost organization will have two half-step extradimensional realms, and we can even plunder more territories in the future. The Ice Bee Realm God said excitedly.

"Yes!"

The god of the sub-tooth realm responded.

......

After the Ziya Realm God returned, he began to urge the bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon.

Rumble!!!!!!

An incomparably huge Black Scale Domain Dragon Phantom gradually condensed, and immediately swallowed this drop of Black Scale Domain Dragon True Blood in one gulp.

Immediately after, countless blood-colored rays of light covered the Black Scale Domain Dragon's phantom, gradually making the Black Scale Domain Dragon real.

At the same time, the consciousness of the god of the Ziya Realm merged with the phantom of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, as if incarnating into the real Black Scale Domain Dragon.

The real Black Scale Domain Dragon is a superdimensional creature who has been born with the power of the extra-dimensional, and the god of the Ziya Realm seems to have mastered the power of the extra-dimensional, but this is only temporary, and he is now using this state to derive the power of the super-dimensional and understand the essence of the super-dimensional power.

Gradually, the gods of the Ziya Realm became more and more aware of the power of the extradimensional.

(cabh) after a long time.

this day.

Rumble!!!

At this moment, he felt incomparably stronger.

"It turns out that this is the feeling of controlling the real extradimensional power, and the previous self was really too weak!"

The God of the Tooth Realm said excitedly.

Moreover, after mastering the power of the extradimensional, the influence of the extradimensional thing on the body was completely suppressed.

It took him a little more time to stabilize his physical body and adjust his state, and then he began to condense the superdimensional Dao species and impact the half-step superdimensional realm.

There was almost no failure rate in the process of impacting the half-step transcendent realm, and he easily condensed the superdimensional dao species, and his cultivation broke through to the half-step extradimensional realm.

After the breakthrough in cultivation, his strength skyrocketed again.

Ice Ghost Organization Headquarters.

The God of the Tooth Realm and the God of the Ice Bee Realm meet.

"Ziya, congratulations on breaking through to the half-step extradimensional realm!"

The Ice Bee Realm God congratulated.

"Thank you Great Chief, if it weren't for the Great Chief, I'm afraid it would be difficult for me to break through to the half-step extradimensional realm!"

Subsequently.

They began to discuss how to kill Ye Tian, and they also knew that Ye Tian had more clones, but Ye Tian's body was definitely still within the eternal realm of the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory.

In their cognition, as long as Ye Tian's body was killed, Ye Tian's other clones would fall.

Of course, they were not afraid of being besieged by Ye Tian's clone.

The clone being able to reach the peak realm god is already the limit, they have hardly heard of the clone of the half-step transcendent realm, and even if there is, it will take unimaginable anti-heaven treasures to refine the clone of the half-step transcendent realm.

So.

They didn't believe that Ye Tian's clones had all reached the half-step transcendent realm.

Taking 10,000 steps back, they really encountered this situation, with the gods of the Ziya Realm, they can retreat safely and will not fall here.

If it weren't for the ability of the Ziya Realm God, the Ice Bee Realm God wouldn't dare to attack and kill Ye Tian.

"Ziya, it's up to you!"

Ice Bee Realm Shinto.

The Ziya Realm God nodded, and immediately closed his eyes, sensing the location of the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory.

His consciousness had traveled to Territory 7362, so he quickly locked on Territory 7362.

Immediately after, he mobilized the ability of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, and a black mist gradually turned into a portal, breaking through the boundary extradimensional barrier.

"Great Chief, get in!"

The god of the Ziya Realm urged, but he couldn't last long.

Whew!

Together, they entered the portal and shuttled into the territory of Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two.

Moreover, the whole process was very hidden, and it did not cause much movement, if you used the extra-dimensional array, then the movement would be very large.

"Let's go, go to the Eternal Realm Realm and kill the true body of that Ye Heaven Realm God!"

The Ice Bee Realm God said coldly.
